name: al-go-local-dev
description: Codex plugin for AL-Go local Docker development with BcContainerHelper-backed build, publish, test, and manual-test handoff workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, publish, test, and hand off AL changes for manual testing in a local BC container.
interface.longDescription: Repo-aware skill bundle for AL developers using AL-Go local Docker environments. It discovers the current app from the edited file, honors AL-Go analyzer settings, uses BcContainerHelper for compiler-folder and publish workflows, and opens the local Business Central client when the change is ready for manual testing.
defaultPrompt: Use AL-Go Local Dev to prepare my current AL change for manual testing in the local BC container.
Use AL-Go Local Dev to build and publish the app containing the file I am editing.
Use AL-Go Local Dev to discover the current AL-Go repo context and the local BC browser URL.
